title: A Hardship.
content:
I never saw a loaf of bread
        Conspicuous in its purity,
     But that I sadly shook my head
        And left five-cents as surety.
meaning:
"A Hardship." is a quintessential example of Edwin C. Ranck's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
